raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX four fraudulent charges were placed on my XXXX account with Barclays Bank. 
Three of the charges were from XXXX XXXX : {$610.00}, {$700.00}, {$690.00} One charge fromXXXX for : {$8800.00}. 

On XX/XX/XXXX I called Barclays and reported the fraud. I have called them numerous times for information. 

The charges from XXXX XXXX have not been removed although I was told they would be removed no later than XX/XX/XXXX. Barclays sent me a new card. The dispute remains. Barclays has not contacted me to discuss.
